phase8HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 8 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as 8e4a760 feat: add site student directory.

routesAdded.purpose: Paginated safe timeline for the selected site student.

siteSelectionBehavior.explicitAccessibleSiteId: Returns detail or timeline only when the selected active student belongs to the selected active site and the role is allowed.
siteSelectionBehavior.explicitStudentOutsideSite: Generic not_found denial without student existence, actual site, program, mentor, or evidence hints.
siteSelectionBehavior.missingSiteIdSingleAccessibleSite: Infers the single accessible site when the selected student belongs to it.
siteSelectionBehavior.missingSiteIdMultipleAccessibleSites: Infers only when the selected student belongs to exactly one accessible site; otherwise requires selection.

studentScopeStrategy: Detail scope starts from active selected-site site_users joined to active student accounts and student role membership.
Program and cohort are derived through selected-site group membership, programs, and cohorts.
Program teacher detail is intersected with getProgramTeacherScopedStudentIds for the selected site.
Mentor detail is intersected with active mentor_assignments for the current mentor and selected-site student.
Workflow tables without site_id are filtered through the selected student id and active selected-site membership.
Legacy global dashboards are not reused as detail data sources.

timelineStrategy.reason: The detail route stays fast and bounded for drawer loading, while full history can paginate independently for Phase 10+ workflow surfaces.

roleVisibilityPolicy.platform_admin: Can view scoped operational detail for any active site student.
roleVisibilityPolicy.admin: Legacy platform-equivalent compatibility can view scoped operational detail for any active site student.
roleVisibilityPolicy.org_admin: Can view scoped operational detail for assigned tenant-site students.
roleVisibilityPolicy.site_admin: Can view scoped operational detail for assigned-site students.
roleVisibilityPolicy.viewer: Can view assigned-site operational detail read-only with mutation permissions false.
roleVisibilityPolicy.program_teacher: Can view scoped evidence, review, submission, and status data for selected-site program/cohort students only; site-wide admin/security/user-management context is omitted.
roleVisibilityPolicy.mentor: Can view assigned-student support detail only; unsafe staff-only/admin/security context is omitted when visibility cannot be proven.

existenceLeakagePolicy.policy: Cross-site and out-of-scope student lookups use generic denial/not-found responses.
doesNotReturn: actual site where the student belongs
whether the student exists in another site
program, mentor, evidence, presentation, archive, or alternate site hints
existenceLeakagePolicy.documentedBehavior: Explicit inaccessible sites keep the existing 403 site access pattern; selected-site student mismatch returns generic not_found.

storyExamplesProven.lookupStrategy: Resolve by seeded display-name prefixes, not hard-coded row ids.
storyExamplesProven.missingMentor: No active mentor and next-action support data.
storyExamplesProven.archiveFailed: Failed archive/export state without raw provider or storage ids.
storyExamplesProven.richTimeline: Multiple timeline event types across seeded workflow data.

workspaceChanges: Replaced disabled Detail view coming soon rows with real View detail actions.
Added a Students detail drawer/panel that calls /api/site/students/:studentId with the selected site id.
Loads /api/site/students/:studentId/timeline when the Timeline tab opens.
Renders Summary, Progress, Submissions, Evidence, Reviews & Comments, Mentor, Presentation, Archive, and Timeline sections.
Uses renderProblemState() for loading, denied, failed, and empty detail states.
Does not prefetch all student details and does not add mutation buttons.

roleAccessMatrix.platform_admin: view any active site student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.admin: view any active site student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.org_admin: view assigned tenant-site student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.site_admin: view assigned-site student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.viewer: view assigned-site student detail and timeline read-only
roleAccessMatrix.program_teacher: view selected-site scoped program/cohort student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.mentor: view assigned selected-site student detail and timeline
roleAccessMatrix.student: 403 denied on site detail/timeline route family

directoryStatePreservation.details: Opening and closing detail only changes siteStudentDetailState. It does not reset directory query, filters, pagination, selected site, or the current directory response. Detail load failures leave the directory list intact.

redactionProof.evidenceAllowed: safe title, kind, count, safe example.com demo URL, and redacted storage status

figmaPatternUsage: renderAppShell product header remains the shell.
localProofUpdates: scripts/prove-local-demo-workspace.mjs now proves detail for the five deterministic story prefixes.

Local proof now checks rich timeline event types, missing mentor next action, revision loop feedback/history, archive failure redaction, viewer read-only detail, site-admin cross-site denial, program-teacher out-of-scope denial, mentor unassigned denial, student denial, bounded detail sections, and no sensitive detail/timeline fields.

validation.npm run test: passed; 291 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips
validation.npm run prove:demo:local: passed; proved five story students, rich timeline event types, viewer read-only, site-admin cross-site denial, program-teacher scoping, mentor assigned-only scoping, student denial, bounded payloads, and no sensitive fields
validation.git diff --check: passed with CRLF normalization warnings only

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote proof or hosted proof was run.
Review decision mutation UI remains Phase 10 work.
Mentor assignment and archive retry/export mutation UI remain future phases.
